prompt.content:
Assess Redwood Components' tax exposure model to recalculate Book/Tax & Financial Statement. Assuming state tax is deducted federally, state apportionment factor of 85% and valuation allowance of 20% (assume 21% federal tax, 6.5% state tax), please re-calculate the following:
- Lost future tax $ benefit (cumulative)
- The effective Tax Rate % impact on 2023 income (Overstatement of DTA / 2023 Taxable Income)
- Net $ DTA sensitivity to +5pp change in valuation allowance and apportionment factor

Round all $ answers to absolute $ value with 0 decimal places. Round all the percentage values to 0.01%.
